name: accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, inaccurate quarterly estimated tax payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate tax calculations instead of manual calculations using spreadsheets.
features: simple user interface for inputting client data
